top_signals.title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
top_signals.summary: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Germany seeks to set up Swedish-style public pension fund
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz backs proposal of investing a share of pension contributions in capital markets

top_signals.title: Europe’s EV Boom Accelerates as Chinese Brands Gain Ground
top_signals.summary: Electric vehicle sales, increasingly featuring Chinese vehicles, led an overall increase in car sales in Europe last month, with gasoline and diesel cars booking declines amid higher prices at the pump. Car registrations, as reported by the European Automobile Manufacturers’ Association, gained 3.6% in May, with the sales increase over the first five months of the year at 4.5%, Reuters reported. Earlier figures, released by E-Mobility and New Automotive, showed a strong, 34% annual increase in European sales of electric vehicles for May.…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
